Comment: Beginning is flipped, learn outside then review. Rest of the class is a bunch of HW she literally does in class with you, midterm and final group project that is broken up into assignments. Something due every week. Always accessible outside of class and you can feel the care she has for her students. Very quirky and sweet. Take her if you can
Tags: Group projects, Caring, Accessible outside class

Comment:
Dr. Huang is the most energetic person I know, and typically this is a bad thing, but in this case it's good. 
If you pay attention in class and don't get an A... I don't know what to say.

She walks through every assignment from the self-paced quizzes to the exam. Literally question by question.
I don't pay attention and I have an A.
Tags: Participation matters, Gives good feedback, Caring

Comment: Professor Huang genuinely may be the nicest professor I've ever had. She is extremely caring towards her students, offers extra credit, explains her assignments very thoroughly, and gives you lots of time to complete, she does a very in-depth exam review which is exactly like the exam, and her lectures are funny and entertaining. Amazing teacher.
Tags: Caring, Lecture heavy, Graded by few things

Comment: She is an amazing professor! Presented materials in a manner that was easy to understand and was available whenever needed during the semester. Takes her time to do the best for students and learning materials are always on point.
Great instructor! Willing to work with students! Helped me understand how technologies work in so many different ways. I retained the information very well!
Professor Huang was caring and helpful! She gave useful feedback and listen to her students. Had fun in this class! The jokes are funny!
Dr. Huang is an amazing teacher! She connects with you, and you will be so supported from her. Honestly, she is the best Professor for BTE.
Great professor with a real sense of humor and relatability. Barely any outside work needs to be done.
Tags: Amazing lectures, Clear grading criteria, Respected

Comment: Best professor at UM. A very straightforward professor that cares about students. No homework, 2 presentations, and 2 exams plus a final. You will not regret taking this professor
